description_long: This hammer features a robust, rectangular head with beveled edges and intricate detailing on its sides, giving it a heavy-duty and ornamental appearance. The head is a dark metallic color, likely steel or iron, and appears solid and weighty. The handle is straight, medium-length, and made of a brown material that resembles wood or a synthetic composite, with a visible grip enhancement near the base. At the end of the handle, there is a looped strap, likely made of leather or synthetic fiber, for secure handling or hanging. The overall design is reminiscent of a sledgehammer or a ceremonial hammer, with a focus on durability and grip. The surface of the hammer is clean and shows no visible signs of wear or branding.
description: A heavy, rectangular-headed hammer with a detailed, dark metallic head and a straight brown handle featuring a looped strap. The design is robust and clean, with no visible wear or branding.
description_view_0: The hammer is viewed from the narrow side of the head, showing the rectangular face and the straight handle extending downward.
description_view_1: The hammer is seen from the broad side, highlighting the detailed, beveled head and the full length of the handle with its looped strap.
description_view_2: Similar to view 0, this shows the opposite narrow side of the head, again emphasizing the rectangular striking face and straight handle.
description_view_3: This view mirrors view 1, displaying the broad, detailed face of the head and the handle with its strap.
attribute_handle_type: Straight brown handle with a visible grip enhancement and a looped strap, likely made of wood or composite with a leather or synthetic fiber strap.
attribute_head_type: Rectangular, solid sledge-type head with beveled edges and ornamental detailing, made of dark metal.
attribute_attachment_or_accessory: Looped strap at the end of the handle
